title: Patient Care Coordinator
description: Parexel is seeking a Patient Care Coordinator to support our clinical research operations in St. Louis. You'll manage patient communications, schedule visits, and ensure excellent participant experiences throughout clinical trials. This remote role allows you to contribute to advancing medical science while working flexibly.
responsibilities: Schedule and coordinate patient appointments and clinical study visits
Communicate with patients via phone and email; address questions and concerns
Maintain patient records and ensure compliance with regulatory requirements
Support patient recruitment and retention activities
Assist with protocol implementation and patient education

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; Bachelor's degree preferred
skills: Strong communication and customer service abilities
Ability to manage multiple tasks and priorities
Basic computer proficiency and data entry
Understanding of patient confidentiality and HIPAA

benefits: Competitive health, dental, and vision coverage
Paid time off and paid holidays
